# WM Newsticker

> A lightweight Gutenberg block for creating animated news tickers in WordPress. Supports scroll, fade, slide, and typing animations.

## Tech Stack

- PHP 7.4+ (WordPress Plugin)
- JavaScript (Gutenberg Block + Frontend)
- SCSS (Editor + Frontend styles)
- @wordpress/scripts (Build tooling)

## Features

- 4 animation styles: Scroll (Marquee), Fade, Slide, Typing
- Manual announcements or dynamic content from WordPress posts
- Category/tag filtering and custom post type support
- Optional user controls (play/pause, prev/next, progress bar)
- RTL language support
- Multilingual (EN, DE, ES)
- No jQuery dependency

## Project Structure

- `wm-newsticker.php` — Main plugin file (v1.4.6)
- `block.json` — Block registration
- `src/index.js` — Block editor component
- `src/frontend.js` — Frontend animation script
- `src/editor.scss` — Editor styles
- `src/style.scss` — Frontend styles
- `build/` — Compiled output
- `languages/` — Translation files (DE, ES)

## Commands

- `npm run build` — Build for production
- `npm run start` — Development with watch mode

## Requirements

- WordPress 5.8+
- PHP 7.4+
- Gutenberg editor enabled

## License

GPL v2 or later
